visiting-berlin-in-june.title: June at a Glance: Compared to May and July
visiting-berlin-in-june.subtitle: How June stacks up against its neighbors

rows.name: May
rows.highlights: Mild temps, blooming gardens, lower crowds. Lakes still cold.

rows.name: June
rows.highlights: Long days, beer gardens fill, Fete de la Musique, lakes warm by mid-month.

rows.name: July
rows.highlights: Hottest temps, busiest crowds, festival season, 48 Stunden Neukolln.

berlin-in-july-2026.title: July at a Glance: Compared to June and August
berlin-in-july-2026.subtitle: How peak summer stacks up against its neighbors

rows.name: June
rows.highlights: Longest days, warm but usually easier, beer gardens and lakes ramp up.

rows.name: July
rows.highlights: Warmest feel, long evenings, Fashion Week, Classic Open Air, CSD, school holidays.

rows.name: August
rows.highlights: Hot lake weather, many locals away, strong summer mood but shorter evenings.

berlin-in-august-2026.title: August at a Glance: Compared to July and September
berlin-in-august-2026.subtitle: How late summer stacks up against its neighbors

rows.name: July
rows.highlights: Longest summer evenings, CSD, Classic Open Air, high visitor demand.

rows.name: August
rows.highlights: Warmest feel, best lake water, Tanz im August, Long Night of Museums, shorter evenings.

rows.name: September
rows.highlights: Better walking weather, fewer peak-season families, Berlin Art Week, Marathon energy.

berlin-in-september-2026.title: September at a Glance: Compared to August and October
berlin-in-september-2026.subtitle: How early shoulder season changes the trip

rows.name: August
rows.highlights: Warmest feel, lake weather, school holidays, and higher peak-season pressure.

rows.name: September
rows.highlights: Best walking weather, Berlin Art Week, Open Monument Day, Marathon energy.

rows.name: October
rows.highlights: Cooler, darker, Festival of Lights, stronger museum-and-cafe rhythm.

berlin-in-october-2026.title: October at a Glance: Compared to September and November
berlin-in-october-2026.subtitle: How autumn changes the trip

rows.name: September
rows.highlights: Best walking weather, Berlin Art Week, Marathon energy, still mild.

rows.name: October
rows.highlights: Golden light, Festival of Lights, German Unity Day, fewer crowds.

rows.name: November
rows.highlights: Cold and grey, quietest month, first Christmas markets late in the month.

berlin-in-november-2026.title: November at a Glance: Compared to October and December
berlin-in-november-2026.subtitle: How the quiet season changes the trip

rows.name: October
rows.highlights: Autumn colour, Festival of Lights, comfortable walking, fewer crowds.

rows.name: November
rows.highlights: Cheapest and quietest, the Wall anniversary, the first Christmas markets.

rows.name: December
rows.highlights: Christmas markets, festive lights, very short days, New Year's Eve.

berlin-in-december-2026.title: December at a Glance: Compared to November and January
berlin-in-december-2026.subtitle: How the festive season changes the trip

rows.name: November
rows.highlights: Cold and quiet, the first Christmas markets open late in the month.

rows.name: December
rows.highlights: Christmas markets, shortest days, festive atmosphere, New Year's Eve.

rows.name: January
rows.highlights: Coldest month, markets gone, calm museums, the lowest prices of the year.

berlin-in-january-2027.title: January at a Glance: Compared to December and February
berlin-in-january-2027.subtitle: How deep winter changes the trip

rows.name: December
rows.highlights: Christmas markets and New Year's Eve, festive but cold and dark.

rows.name: January
rows.highlights: Coldest, quietest, cheapest month, Grune Woche, museum-heavy.

rows.name: February
rows.highlights: Still cold, lengthening days, the Berlinale film festival.

berlin-in-february-2027.title: February at a Glance: Compared to January and March
berlin-in-february-2027.subtitle: How late winter changes the trip

rows.name: January
rows.highlights: Coldest and cheapest, calm museums, the lowest crowds.

rows.name: February
rows.highlights: Cold but lengthening days, the Berlinale, low prices.

rows.name: March
rows.highlights: Spring begins, clock change, longer evenings, Easter in 2027.

berlin-in-march-2027.title: March at a Glance: Compared to February and April
berlin-in-march-2027.subtitle: How early spring changes the trip

rows.name: February
rows.highlights: Cold winter, the Berlinale, quiet and cheap.

rows.name: March
rows.highlights: Spring arrives, clocks forward, long evenings late in the month, Easter.

rows.name: April
rows.highlights: Cherry blossom, long days, Gallery Weekend, changeable weather.

berlin-in-april-2027.title: April at a Glance: Compared to March and May
berlin-in-april-2027.subtitle: How spring changes the trip

rows.name: March
rows.highlights: Spring begins, changeable, longer evenings after the clock change.

rows.name: April
rows.highlights: Cherry blossom, green parks, long evenings, Gallery Weekend.

rows.name: May
rows.highlights: Friendly weather, festivals, beer gardens, the sweet spot before summer.

berlin-in-may-2027.title: May at a Glance: Compared to April and June
berlin-in-may-2027.subtitle: How late spring changes the trip

rows.name: April
rows.highlights: Cherry blossom and long evenings, but unpredictable weather.

rows.name: May
rows.highlights: Friendly weather, long days, Carnival of Cultures, beer gardens, not yet peak.

rows.name: June
rows.highlights: Long days, beer gardens, lakes warm by mid-month, busier.
